Document:
[color=#ffff00][head=3]Section 7: Point of Interest and Safe Zone Rules[/head][/color]
[color=#a4885c]7.1[/color] Under no circumstances should a Point of Interest be intentionally disabled or destroyed without a specific purpose or an order from a member of Command or an Admin. ★
[color=#a4885c]7.2[/color] Venmar Station and Medical Dispatch are categorized as Safe Zones. While in a Safe Zone, you must not use any explosives or destructive devices, or fire your ship guns.
[color=#a4885c]7.2A[/color] A 512m area around the Safe Zone stations is also considered a Safe Zone.
[color=#a4885c]7.2B[/color] Do not flee to Safe Zones purely to avoid consequences for antagonistic actions. ★
[color=#a4885c]7.3[/color] Antagonistic actions such as murders, attacks, and thefts are to be handled IC. Major damage such as bombings or station destruction will be handled by an Admin. ★★
[color=#a4885c]7.4[/color] Do not steal anything from a Point of Interest that is critical to its function. ★
